title: Crudi Dench Someone Help Her
description: *RING RING* who is it? It’s award-winning drag queen Crudi Dench with her brand new, solo comedy debut show! Cheeky Northern piglet Crudi is taping "Someone Help Her!" her new telly show in the vein of Cilla Black's "Surprise Surprise". She ready to help the callers on the line with their problems aided by special guests in her studio audience (you). An hour of stand-up, audience interaction and picking up a camp telephone. Star of award-winning fringe hits and sell-out Brighton fringe shows ‘Drag Queens vs Zombies’ and ‘Drag Queens vs Vampires’, come and help her, help you, help her become the light entertainment TV star she knows deep down she is. Stunning reviews of previous appearances below:

venue.name: WundaBarn at The SpiegelGardens
venue.address: Victoria Gardens, Brighton and Hove, East Sussex
